title: Franklin Short-Term Municipal Income ETF declares $0.0309 dividend
content:
* Franklin Short-Term Municipal Income ETF (FTMS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTMS]) declared $0.0309/share monthly dividend [https://www.franklintempleton.com/investments/options/exchange-traded-funds/products/48362/SINGLCLASS/franklin-short-term-municipal-income-etf/FTMS#distributions].
 	* Payable Feb. 5; for shareholders of record Feb. 2; ex-div Feb. 2.
 	* See FTMS Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/]
